CSorro Platform

Sign in to your operating system.

Real accounts now connect to Supabase Auth. Workspaces, projects and permissions can now belong to actual users instead of demo data.

Checking backend
Private by default
Your account only loads workspaces you own or have been invited to.
Password recovery included
Forgotten passwords can be reset through Supabase email recovery.

Sign in

Use your CSorro account to access your workspaces.

Add your Supabase URL and anon key in /os/app/platform-config.js to enable live login.

Back to Dashboard
